Thanks for using a Neo Genesis open dataset. We track dataset citations to measure real-world impact and to plan future dataset releases. CC-BY-4.0 only requires attribution, but a quick report here helps us prioritise what to publish next.

## Which dataset

<!-- Pick the closest match. -->

- [ ] Korean RAG SSOT Golden 50 (`neogenesislab/korean-rag-ssot-golden-50`)
- [ ] EthicaAI Mixed-Safe Evidence (`neogenesislab/ethicaai-mixed-safe-evidence`)
- [ ] WhyLab Gemini 2.5 Docker Validation (`neogenesislab/whylab-gemini-2-5-docker-validation`)
- [ ] SBU pSEO Effects 2026-04 (`neogenesislab/sbu-pseo-effects-2026-04`)
- [ ] Cross-Agent Review Queue 2026 (`neogenesislab/cross-agent-review-queue-2026`)
- [ ] Korean LLM Citation Baseline 2026 (`neogenesislab/korean-llm-citation-baseline-2026`)
- [ ] Sora Multi-Device Orchestration 2026 (`neogenesislab/sora-multi-device-orchestration-2026`)
- [ ] Quant v11 Ensemble 6-Alpha Specs 2026 (`neogenesislab/quant-v11-ensemble-6alpha-specs-2026`)

## How did you use it

<!-- Pick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Paper or technical report (please link the preprint)
- [ ] Blog post or article (please link the URL)
- [ ] Model evaluation or benchmark
- [ ] Product feature
- [ ] Teaching material
- [ ] Internal experiment (no public artefact)
